d55a50c6.name: rsi_14_rsi_2_combined_mutation
d55a50c6.explanation: Combines slower RSI 14 with faster RSI 2, using slightly less extreme oversold/overbought thresholds for entries and exits.

b6074d97.name: rsi_2_rsi_14_ema_20_combo
b6074d97.explanation: Mutated empty parent into a conservative RSI mean-reversion strategy: strong buys require very low RSI(2) plus RSI(14) confirmation, while sells require elevated RSI(2) plus RSI(14) confirmation; EMA(20) adds a weak trend filter for secondary signals.

2b580042.name: RSI 2/14 Confirmation Reversal
2b580042.explanation: Tightens the RSI reversal thresholds and requires the fast RSI to confirm the slower RSI before issuing buy or sell signals.

c44b32ef.name: rsi14_ema_combined_mutation
c44b32ef.explanation: Tightens the parent RSI thresholds and combines RSI 14 with RSI 2 plus a positive EMA filter for buy and sell signals.

a63f46e9.name: Fallback_Mutant_of_1771d234

7bb37ed9.name: RSI_EMA_Confirmation
7bb37ed9.explanation: Combines short-term and medium-term RSI with an EMA presence filter: buy on deep short-term oversold conditions confirmed by medium RSI, sell on extreme short-term overbought conditions confirmed by medium RSI.

0dceb7ef.name: Fallback_Mutant_of_1771d234

2550abc9.name: rsi_combo_thresholds_v1
2550abc9.explanation: Mutated the empty parent into a Gemini RSI strategy using stricter combined RSI thresholds with EMA presence as a simple trend filter.
